titlestmt.titleproper: South Holland, Ill. Thornridge United Church of Christ records, 1959-1994.
titlestmt.author: Zachary Bodnar

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 8, 2026 at 18:20

did.unittitle: South Holland, Ill. Thornridge United Church of Christ records, 1959-1994.
did.abstract: The Thornridge Community Church, in South Holland, Illinois, was gathered in 1959. The name of the church changed to Thornridge United Church of Christ in May 1964. The church dissolved in 1995. This collection contains a single church register which includes vital membership records and a folder of legal records.

corpname.part: Thornridge United Church of Christ (South Holland, Ill.)

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to this collection is unrestricted and open to the public.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use
userestrict.p: Items in this collection are subject to U.S. Copyright Law. It is the responsibility of the researcher to determine the copyright status of collection items and to secure any permissions necessary for their reproduction and publication. Requests for permission to publish material must be discussed with the archivist or librarian.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], in the South Holland, Ill. Thornridge United Church of Christ records, 1959-1994, RG5591. The Congregational Library & Archives, Boston, MA.

acqinfo.head: Acquisition Information
acqinfo.p: Materials were donated to the Congregational Library & Archives by the Illinois Conference of the United Church of Christ in December 2024; accession number 2024-46.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This collection was processed by Zachary Bodnar, April 2026, according to the rules of Describing Archives: A Content Standard.

bioghist.head: Historical Note
bioghist.p: The Thornridge Community Church, in South Holland, Illinois, was likely gathered in 1959 with Rev. Kenneth Berg as the church's first pastor. The name of the church changed to Thornridge United Church of Christ in May 1964 under the pastorate of Rev. George E. Crandall. The church dissolved in 1995 with its last service held on Easter Sunday.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection contains a single church register which includes church membership records, baptismal records, marriage records, and death records. The collection also contains a folder of legal documents that include the church's charter, mortgage related indentures, and a form related to the change of the church's name.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this collection have been arranged in chronological order.

corpname.part: Thornridge United Church of Christ (South Holland, Ill.)
